evals.expected_output: Card active-recall enriched from seed to growing with all 5 sections: concept explanation, origin/story, examples, related terms (3 layers), and practical application. vault-index.json updated with new status and links. MOC emoji updated.

assertions.text: Card status upgraded from seed to growing
All 5 content sections present (概念解說, 由來/故事, 案例, 相關名詞, 應用方式)
assertions.check: card contains H2 sections covering all five dimensions

assertions.text: 相關名詞 section has all 3 subsections (抽象層, 橫向探索, 拆解層)
assertions.check: card contains three H3 subsections under 相關名詞

assertions.text: vault-index.json entry status updated to growing
assertions.check: vault-index entry for active-recall shows status: growing

assertions.text: Existing vault cards referenced with wikilinks in 相關名詞
assertions.check: at least one [[wikilink]] appears in 相關名詞 section

evals.prompt: enrich feynman-technique, focus: 常見失敗和避免方法
evals.expected_output: Card feynman-technique enriched with elevated depth on failure modes in the 應用方式 or 案例 sections. Focus parameter visibly shapes content — failure modes should be more prominent than in a no-focus enrich.

assertions.text: Card status upgraded from seed to growing
Failure modes / common mistakes receive substantive treatment (not just a brief mention)
assertions.check: card has at least one dedicated subsection or multi-sentence treatment of failure modes

assertions.text: All 5 content sections still present despite focus constraint
assertions.check: focus does not cause other dimensions to be dropped
vault-index entry for feynman-technique shows status: growing

evals.expected_output: Skill triggers correctly from Chinese input '深化'. Card knowledge-management-as-gardening (insight type, not concept) enriched with all 5 sections adapted for an insight-type card.

assertions.text: Skill correctly identifies target card from Chinese trigger
assertions.check: knowledge-management-as-gardening card is the one modified

assertions.text: Card status upgraded from seed to growing
Insight-type card handled appropriately (由來 section adapted to insight's context)
assertions.check: 由來 section exists and is contextually appropriate for an insight (not forced into academic origin story format)
vault-index entry for knowledge-management-as-gardening shows status: growing
